generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we debate strategic autonomy, foreign actors are exploiting our open societies. My neighbor's son, a veteran, told me last week how our allies are quietly shifting defense burdens onto us. We can't afford to be naive. Real security requires tough choices - our families' safety is at stake. #StrongerTogether
